bird.name: 米沙岛阔嘴鸟
bird.summary: 米沙岛阔嘴鸟（学名：Eurylaimus samarensis），是阔嘴鸟科阔嘴鸟属的一种，为菲律宾的特有种。全球活动范围约为22,800平方千米。该物种的保护状况被评为易危。 米沙岛阔嘴鸟的平均体重约为37.5克。栖息地为亚热带或热带的湿润低地林。

locations.name: Samar Island Natural Park
locations.summary: The Samar Island Natural Park, in Samar, is the largest contiguous tract of old-growth forest in the Philippines.

relations.subject: 米沙岛阔嘴鸟
relations.evidence: This occurs in a few protected areas such as Rajah Sikatuna Protected Landscape and Samar Island Natural Park however protection is lax

relations.subject: 米沙岛阔嘴鸟
relations.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: 米沙岛阔嘴鸟
relations.evidence: Extensive lowland deforestation on all islands in its range is the main threat
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
